usage: create_spice_deck [-help] [-add_driver_for_constraint_check {true false}] [-add_side_load_measurement {true false}] [-add_voltage_for_missing_sensitization] [-aging_correlation_type {full timingonly}] [-aging_stress_num_cycles <integer>] [-aging_stress_use_timing_slew {true false}] [-aginglevel_only <string>] [-bbox_cells <string>] [-constraint_check {true false}] [-depth <integer>] [-enable_arrival_measurements {true false}] [-enable_fast_simulation {true false}] [-enable_mis {tied_input independent_input none}] [-enable_spectre_x {true false}] [-exclude_side_load_cells <string>] [-exclude_side_load_cells_for_missing_subckt {true false}] [-file_prefix <string>] [-force_delete_output_dir] [-format <string>] [-from <string>] [-from_fall <string>] [-from_rise <string>] [-generate_output_only {true false}] [-glitch_simulation_mode {input_output output}] [-ground <string>] [-include_cell_variation {true false}] [-lsf_job_string <string>] [-mc_simulation_init_args <string>] [-mc_simulation_tran_args <string>] [-measure_point {all path stage none}] [-merge_spice_deck {true false}] [-model_file <string>] [-no_hard_stop_at_to_pins {true false}] [-omipath <string>] [-outdir <string>] [-power <string>] [-receiver_pin <string>] [-reliability_commands <string>] [-reliability_model_type {URI OMI TMI TI_URI}] [-report_noise <string>] [-report_timing <string>] overwrite}] [-user_defined_measure_statements_file <string>] [-view <string>] [-waveform_aware_pulse_width_checks {true false}] [-xtalk {delay vl_glitch vh_glitch vlu_glitch vho_glitch}] [ [ > | >> ] ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -add_driver_for_constraint_check
options.description: {true false} add real driver at clock and data

options.name: -add_side_load_measurement
options.description: add the side load measurement in clock mesh Spice deck

options.name: -add_voltage_for_missing_sensitization
options.description: add_voltage_for_missing_sensitization

options.name: -aging_correlation_type
options.description: {full timingonly} create aging aware deck

options.name: -aging_stress_num_cycles
options.description: Uses that many # of cycles of stimuli in stress deck.

options.name: -aging_stress_use_timing_slew
options.description: {true false} correct slew to be used in stress deck.

options.name: -aginglevel_only
options.description: For URI models

options.name: -bbox_cells
options.description: list of cells to be considered as black boxes

options.name: -constraint_check
options.description: to enable constraint validation flow

options.name: -depth
options.description: create clock mesh spice deck of depth

options.name: -enable_arrival_measurements
options.description: {true false} To add arrival measurements

options.name: -enable_fast_simulation
options.description: one transition simulation using initial conditions

options.name: -enable_mis
options.description: {tied_input independent_input none}

options.name: -enable_spectre_x
options.description: enable spectreX license checkout when launching spectre

options.name: -exclude_side_load_cells
options.description: List of cells for which pin cap will be used for side loads instead instantiating them

options.name: -exclude_side_load_cells_for_missing_subckt
options.description: {true false} When true, it will add side load pin cap for missing SPICE Subckt cell instead instantiating it

options.name: -file_prefix
options.description: Adds this prefix to the spice deck files generated

options.name: -force_delete_output_dir
options.description: completely remove the directory given by the user in the outdir option

options.name: -format
options.description: changes run path simulation internal reporting format. Format columns should be compatible to report_timing_format. Once set same will be used for subsequent create_spice_deck command

options.name: -from
options.description: creates the spice deck with mesh net starting from pin

options.name: -from_fall
options.description: creates the spice deck with mesh net starting from falling transition of specified from pin

options.name: -from_rise
options.description: creates the spice deck with mesh net starting from rising transition of specified from pin

options.name: -generate_output_only
options.description: Generate output from existing created database file

options.name: -glitch_simulation_mode
options.description: {input_output output} input_output : default (rip+rop simulation) output : SPICE ROP will be computed using Tempus RIP

options.name: -ground
options.description: list of ground nodes

options.name: -include_cell_variation
options.description: to include in via variation

options.name: -lsf_job_string
options.description: handle to the farm job for launching simulation

options.name: -mc_simulation_init_args
options.description: montecarlo simulation settings, deafult: numruns=1000 variations=mismatch sampling=lhs paramfile=Param.txt scalarfile=MCData.txt dut=[%s]

options.name: -mc_simulation_tran_args
options.description: montecarlo simulation settings, deafult: start=0 stop=%g step=1p errpreset=conservative

options.name: -measure_point
options.description: whether to add all or path or stage measurements. default is all

options.name: -merge_spice_deck
options.description: option to enable merged SPICE deck

options.name: -model_file
options.description: model file, to be included in generated spice

options.name: -no_hard_stop_at_to_pins
options.description: when it is true, it would traverse down all the way till it hits clock pin of flop or any stop point specified with -to{} option or it passes depth specified with -depth option

options.name: -omipath
options.description: OMI model directory

options.name: -outdir
options.description: output directory for created spice

options.name: -power
options.description: list of power nodes

options.name: -receiver_pin
options.description: listof receiver pins for glitch spice deck

options.name: -reliability_commands
options.description: extra user commands for reliability section (before transient analysis statements in reliability section)

options.name: -reliability_model_type
options.description: {URI OMI TMI TI_URI} create aging aware deck

options.name: -report_noise
options.description: arguments to report_noise command for glitch spice deck creation

options.name: -report_timing
options.description: arguments to report_timing command

options.name: -run_simulation
options.description: enable path simulation in adddition to generating spice deck

options.name: -segment
options.description: {data_path launch_path launch_clock_path capture_path all} creates the spice deck of the segment out of path spice deck

options.name: -segment_end
options.description: specify segment end term name

options.name: -segment_start
options.description: specify segment start term name

options.name: -side_path_level
options.description: Specifies the number of levels of side path stages to be included in the SPICE trace. Only 0 or 1 can be provided. Default is 1

options.name: -spectre
options.description: loaction of spectre path

options.name: -spectre_analysis_options
options.description: spectre options

options.name: -spectre_cmd_options
options.description: command line options for spectre

options.name: -spectre_lang_escape_chars
options.description: escape characters list in spectre

options.name: -spice_include
options.description: included as is in the generated spice deck

options.name: -spice_include_reliability
options.description: To specify user-provided std::string inside reliability

options.name: -start_from_cppr_pin
options.description: Starts the SPICE simulations from CPPR point

options.name: -stimuli_file
options.description: Allows you to specify the stimuli to be used for cells where SPICE deck has a difficult time sensitizing.

options.name: -subckt_file
options.description: subckt file, to be included in generated spice

options.name: -supply_voltage_file
options.description: user defined power/ground voltage file

options.name: -supply_voltage_file_stress
options.description: user defined power/ground voltage file

options.name: -sweep_range
options.description: Range to sweep the victim

options.name: -sweep_steps
options.description: Number of steps by which the victim is swept

options.name: -sweep_victim
options.description: to enable victim sweep

options.name: -temperature
options.description: user defined temperature to be used in SPICE simulations. Unit: Celsius.

options.name: -through
options.description: creates the spice deck with mesh net going by -through points

options.name: -to
options.description: creates the spice deck with mesh net ending at to pins

options.name: -uri_lib_file
options.description: For URI models (e.g. Samsung)

options.name: -uri_mode
options.description: To specify URI appendage option; #default=appendage

options.name: -use_control_param
options.description: spice deck created will be controlled throuh param

options.name: -use_distributed_load_for_side_receivers
options.description: {true false} whether to use receiver load as distributed load or lumped load

options.name: -use_ndw_for_constraint_check
options.description: {true false} use ndw for constraint check

options.name: -use_noise_model_when_cond
options.description: use when condition from pin noise model

options.name: -use_predriver_waveform_at_startpoint
options.description: {true false} Specifies whether to use pre-driver waveform or propagated waveform at startpoint

options.name: -user_defined_measure_statements
options.description: {append overwrite} user defined statements; deafault is append

options.name: -user_defined_measure_statements_file
options.description: <string> user defined measurements

options.name: -view
options.description: view name, if glitch spice deck is create for other than default view

options.name: -waveform_aware_pulse_width_checks
options.description: {true false} deck for waveform aware pulse width checks

options.name: -xtalk
options.description: redirect -run_path_simulation/-run_simulation output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename> # append -run_path_simulation/-run_simulation to output file
